name: Credit Consulting Services
description_short: Credit Consulting Services is a credit repair provider based in Salinas, California. Rated 4.6/5 with 132 Google reviews, reflecting excellent customer satisfaction.
description_long:
Credit Consulting Services is a credit repair provider serving clients in Salinas, California. With 132 Google reviews and a 4.6/5.0 rating, Credit Consulting Services has built a significant presence in the local credit repair market.

Operating as a debt collection agency, Credit Consulting Services provides a range of services for consumers seeking credit repair solutions. Additional information about their services and processes can typically be found on their website.

When evaluating credit repair services in Salinas, consumers should look for providers that dispute directly with all three credit bureaus — Equifax, Experian, and TransUnion. Key differentiators include transparency around pricing, realistic timelines for results, and whether the company offers a money-back guarantee. Credit Consulting Services operates in a highly regulated industry under the Credit Repair Organizations Act (CROA), which requires written contracts, a three-day cancellation window, and prohibits upfront fees before services are rendered.

Consumers in the Salinas, California area who are considering Credit Consulting Services should contact the company directly to discuss their specific situation and get current pricing information. As with any credit repair provider, it is advisable to compare multiple options, verify licensing and credentials, and read recent customer reviews before making a decision.

pricing.guarantee_details: Contact provider for current pricing and guarantee details.
